answers.label: Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)
I like creating, designing, or making things
Mixed — I want variety in my environment
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work
Occupational therapy — helping people function in daily life

steps.title: Essential Prerequisites
steps.objective: Foundational knowledge required before preparing for occupational therapist

milestones.title: Complete Essential Prerequisites
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Foundational knowledge required before preparing for occupational therapist' by completing tasks such as: (Basic prerequisites).

children.title: Foundational Science Knowledge (Biology & Chemistry)
children.objective: A strong understanding of basic biological principles (human anatomy, physiology) and fundamental chemistry concepts is essential. These subjects are prerequisites for most undergraduate and graduate occupational therapy programs, forming the scientific basis for understanding health conditions, body systems, and interventions.

resources.title: Khan Academy: High School Biology & Chemistry

milestones.title: Complete Foundational Science Knowledge (Biology & Chemistry)
milestones.description: Establish a baseline in Foundational Science Knowledge (Biology & Chemistry) before moving on.

tasks.title: Learn Basics
tasks.description: A strong understanding of basic biological principles (human anatomy, physiology) and fundamental chemistry concepts is essential. These subjects are prerequisites for most undergraduate and graduate occupational therapy programs, forming the scientific basis for understanding health conditions, body systems, and interventions.

children.title: Strong Communication and Interpersonal Skills
children.objective: Occupational therapists work intimately with diverse clients, families, and healthcare teams. The ability to listen actively, communicate clearly (verbally and in writing), build rapport, and demonstrate empathy is paramount for effective assessment, treatment, and collaboration.

resources.title: Coursera: Improve Your Communication Skills (University of Pennsylvania)

milestones.title: Complete Strong Communication and Interpersonal Skills
milestones.description: Establish a baseline in Strong Communication and Interpersonal Skills before moving on.

tasks.title: Learn Basics
tasks.description: Occupational therapists work intimately with diverse clients, families, and healthcare teams. The ability to listen actively, communicate clearly (verbally and in writing), build rapport, and demonstrate empathy is paramount for effective assessment, treatment, and collaboration.

children.title: Critical Thinking and Problem-Solving Abilities
children.objective: OTs must constantly assess complex patient situations, analyze information, develop individualized treatment plans, and adapt interventions as client needs evolve. This requires robust analytical reasoning, problem-identification, and creative problem-solving skills.

resources.title: edX: Critical Thinking & Problem Solving (Rochester Institute of Technology)

milestones.title: Complete Critical Thinking and Problem-Solving Abilities
milestones.description: Establish a baseline in Critical Thinking and Problem-Solving Abilities before moving on.

tasks.title: Learn Basics
tasks.description: OTs must constantly assess complex patient situations, analyze information, develop individualized treatment plans, and adapt interventions as client needs evolve. This requires robust analytical reasoning, problem-identification, and creative problem-solving skills.
